name: translate_text
description: Translate one or more text strings from a source language to a target language. Supports auto-detection of source language, formality control, custom glossaries, and context-aware translation quality improvements.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Array of text strings to translate (max 50 items, total body max 128 KiB).

parameters.name: source_lang
parameters.description: Source language code. Auto-detected if omitted.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Additional context to improve translation quality. Not translated itself and not billed.
parameters.example: This is a formal business email.

parameters.name: formality
parameters.description: Desired formality level: 'default', 'more', 'less', 'prefer_more', 'prefer_less'. Not all languages support this.

parameters.name: glossary_id
parameters.description: ID of a custom glossary to enforce consistent term translations. Requires source_lang.

parameters.name: preserve_formatting
parameters.description: Whether to preserve original text formatting.

parameters.name: tag_handling
parameters.description: Enable XML or HTML tag handling: 'xml' or 'html'.
